Gautam Gambhir Slams IPL Owner’s Call for Split Coaching: “No Right to Interfere”

Dec 8, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Gautam Gambhir Slams IPL Owner Over Split Coaching Idea

Gautam Gambhir has firmly rejected an IPL owner’s suggestion for separate Test and limited-overs coaches for India, stating that outsiders have “no right to interfere” in national team decisions.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Gautam Gambhir Slams IPL Owner’s Call for Split Coaching: “No Right to Interfere”
